title: lettsomia kerrii
intro: Lettsomia kerrii, also known as the Malay Lettsomia, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Ebenaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lettsomia kerrii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparation often involves making a decoction from the plant's leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to affected areas.
